text: cleared acne, dried skin out considerably. Was very easy to use. Did not take much to use. No smell or fragrance. created such redness and irratation my face looked worse from that then it did from the acne. Created cracks around my eye area that was very sensitive. My skin burned and stung. Skin became so dry it itched. I was embarrased by the redness and flaking. It almost looked like my skin was burned apply nightly to clean skin
